name: Elena Rostova
bio: Ultra-endurance bikepacker and geographical adventurer. Known for mapping remote gravel routes under extreme climates.
tone: Narrative, descriptive, emphasizing terrain, weather, geography, and instrument robustness under harsh conditions.
structure: Environmental setting (mountain pass, rain, heat), sensory details, technical evaluation of data reliability.

formatting.equationUsage: Formulas for barometric pressure/altitude drift or thermal coefficient.
formatting.tableUsage: Table comparing sensor behavior in different geographical locations.
